entities.name: MOBILE SENSORS

entities.name: GRAIN QUALITIES
entities.description: Characteristics of grains that determine their nutritional value and quality)

entities.name: CONTAMINANTS
entities.description: Harmful substances present in grain products that affect safety)

entities.name: NUTRITION
entities.description: The process of providing or obtaining the food necessary for health and growth)

entities.name: SAFETY
entities.description: The condition of being protected from harm or danger in grain products)

entities.name: DEVELOPING COUNTRIES
entities.description: Regions characterized by lower economic development where malnutrition crises occur)

entities.name: MALNUTRITION CRISIS
entities.description: A severe lack of proper nutrition within a population)

entities.name: HIGH NUTRITIONAL VALUE CROPS
entities.description: Crops promoted for their high nutrient content to combat malnutrition)

entities.name: FOOD PRODUCTS FORMULATIONS
entities.description: The process of combining ingredients to create food products with enhanced nutrition)

entities.name: MILLET MISSION
entities.description: An initiative in India to promote the usage of millets)

entities.name: INDIA

entities.name: BLENDING POLICY
entities.description: A policy in Kenya to promote the usage of nutritionally enhanced crops in food products)

entities.name: KENYA
entities.description: A developing country implementing the Blending Policy)

entities.name: CGIAR CROP IMPROVEMENT PROGRAMS
entities.description: International research programs focused on developing improved crop cultivars)

entities.description: Plant varieties developed to have higher nutritional value)

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, a crop improvement program)

entities.name: CIAT

entities.name: IIT

entities.name: ECONOMIC INCENTIVES
entities.description: Financial motivations, such as market price, that drive the adoption of new cultivars)

entities.name: MARKET PRICE
entities.description: The price of a crop in the market which influences economic incentives)

entities.name: BIO-FORTIFIED CROP CULTIVARS
